{{CargoRelic
|name=Ticket Gleaners
|class_id=20148
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=The style of this oil painting is rather bright with soft tones, depicting a scene where people walk on the fields in the autumn, picking up the left lottery tickets on the ground. What a masterpiece of realism!
|fame=18
|art=30
|fth=14
|civ=10
|tech=18
|ss1=Each lottery draw gives +1 Lucky Voucher by +2%<br>Per 10 Lotteries drawn, Snail RUSH +2<br>Lotteries Drawn: 200/200
|ss2=Each lottery draw gives +1 Lucky Voucher by +4%<br>Per 10 Lotteries drawn, Snail RUSH +4<br>Lotteries Drawn: 200/200
|ss3=Each lottery draw gives +1 Lucky Voucher by +6%<br>Per 10 Lotteries drawn, Snail RUSH +6<br>Lotteries Drawn: 200/200
|ss4=Each lottery draw gives +1 Lucky Voucher by +6%<br>Per 10 Lotteries drawn, Snail RUSH +6<br>Lotteries Drawn: 200/200
|ss7=Each lottery draw gives +1 Lucky Voucher by +6%<br>Per 10 Lotteries drawn, Snail RUSH +6<br>Lotteries Drawn: 200/200<br> (Awakened)
}}
